nasb.text: For you say, ‘Where is the house of the nobleman, And where is the tent, the dwelling places of the wicked?’

esv.text: For you say, ‘Where is the house of the prince? Where is the tent in which the wicked lived?’

cnv.text: 你們問：‘霸王的房屋在哪裡？ 惡人住過的帳棚在哪裡？’

ccb.text: 你们问，‘权贵的房子如今何在？ 恶人住的帐篷今在何方？’
